calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-16-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jo-Anna M. Nieves, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Nancy Yu.

Magic West sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
Defendants Does 1-10 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff CCH, LLC., and against Defendant Nancy Yu as follows:
Principal $29,134.78
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $610.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $29,744.78
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Set For Trial On Sep-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
